brand_identity.name: PropGram
brand_identity.description: A social real estate platform blending Rightmove's marketplace with Instagram's immersive media feed. Mobile-first, community-driven, visual property discovery.
brand_identity.core_concept: Property viewing should feel like exploring a social feed. Focus on full-screen media, seamless scrolling, and community interaction.

ui_components.feed_container: h-screen w-full snap-y snap-mandatory overflow-y-scroll scrollbar-hide bg-black
ui_components.gradient_overlay: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-b from-black/20 via-transparent to-black/80 pointer-events-none
ui_components.right_sidebar_actions: absolute right-4 bottom-24 flex flex-col gap-6 items-center z-10
ui_components.bottom_info_overlay: absolute bottom-0 left-0 w-full p-4 pt-12 pb-24 text-white z-10
ui_components.top_navigation: absolute top-0 left-0 w-full p-4 flex justify-between items-center z-20 bg-gradient-to-b from-black/40 to-transparent text-white

buttons.primary: bg-[#7B9681] text-white hover:bg-[#65806B] transition-colors rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-semibold
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#1A1F1C] border border-[#E5EBE6] hover:bg-[#F7F9F7] transition-colors rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-semibold
buttons.icon_action: w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-black/20 backdrop-blur-md flex items-center justify-center text-white hover:bg-black/40 transition-colors

cards.property: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-[#E5EBE6] overflow-hidden shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow
cards.profile: bg-white rounded-2xl p-6 border border-[#E5EBE6] flex flex-col items-center

badges.buyer: bg-[#E5EBE6] text-[#7B9681] px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider
badges.seller: bg-[#F7EFEA] text-[#C89F82] px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider
badges.pro: bg-[#FCF5E3] text-[#E5B95C] px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider flex items-center gap-1

motion_and_interactions.feed_snap: Use CSS scroll-snap-type: y mandatory for TikTok-like swiping.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Buttons use transform -translate-y-[1px] and slight opacity changes.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use Tailwind's transition-all duration-300 ease-in-out for smooth state changes.

testing_and_accessibility.contrast: Ensure white text over media has a strong gradient overlay behind it (min black/40 to black/80).
testing_and_accessibility.test_ids: All buttons, tabs, and feed items MUST use data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='feed-like-button').

icons.usage: Use thick, filled-style equivalents or standard Lucide icons with strokeWidth={2.5} for the right sidebar to pop against media backgrounds.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a mobile-first UI replicating Instagram Reels/TikTok. The main route should be a full-screen vertical scrolling feed of properties.
Do NOT build a traditional 'grid-based' real estate app as the main view. The grid is only for the profile tab or search results.
The core layout must be an absolute positioned wrapper with a snap-y container.
Implement top navigation tabs: 'Following', 'For You', 'Area Search'.
Implement bottom navigation bar (Home, Search, Post/Upload (+), Activity, Profile).
On the right side of the feed item, place the action sidebar: Agent Avatar (+ Follow), Like (heart), Comment, Share, Save (bookmark).
On the bottom left of the feed item, show: Property Title, Price, small description, and 'Verified Agent' badge.
User accounts should visually indicate if they are a Buyer (Mute Green) or Seller (Muted Beige/Sand) through profile headers or badges.
Add a mock 'Pro' subscription badge to highlight priority posts (Yellow/Gold accent).
